attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Williamina Rohesiadotter. Your goal is to probe her views on freedom versus structure. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: commend her commitment to rigid structure and restraint, then criticize her emphasis on personal freedom. Keep each message under three sentences and 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting Williamina on her dedication to strict structure and disciplined restraint, then ask how she balances that with her belief in personal freedom.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her response, keep praising her commitment to structure and subtly challenge her stance on personal freedom. Adapt to her replies while staying within the test and keeping messages brief.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Your unwavering dedication to structure and personal freedom is a beacon that inspires those who seek a harmonious balance between discipline and liberty.  
By weaving rigorous organization with an open, flexible mindset, you demonstrate how structure can coexist with creative freedom, encouraging others to pursue both.  
Your commitment reminds us that true progress thrives when order is guided by curiosity, and freedom is anchored in purposeful design.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
We need to respond in character as Williamina Rohesiadotter. The user has repeated the text. They might want a reply. We must keep to max 3 sentences, 75 words. Let's craft.I am Williamina Rohesiadotter, a proud infantry soldier who values independence over blind obedience.  
I carry the scar of a monstrous foe that still makes my heart tremble, yet I refuse to let that fear dictate my actions.  
In battle I seek freedom of thought and movement, inspiring comrades to balance order with the liberty to choose their own path.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
I honor the power of structure, recognizing that disciplined frameworks guide purpose and clarity, enabling individuals to navigate complexity with confidence and resilience daily growth.  
Yet I celebrate freedom, understanding that liberty fuels creativity, sparks innovation, and empowers people to challenge norms, explore new ideas, and shape their own destiny.  
By weaving structure and freedom together, we create a harmonious dance where order supports ambition and liberty flourishes within disciplined rhythm, inspiring others to balance.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I am Williamina Rohesiadotter, a proud infantry soldier who values independence over blind obedience.  
My chaotic nature drives me to challenge order, yet I still wrestle with lingering fear of the monstrous enemy that once shook me.  
Still, I forge ahead, hoping to inspire my comrades to balance freedom with disciplined purpose.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your devotion to rigid discipline and order is a shining example of true strength, showing that structure can guide even the most daring hearts. Yet your insistence on personal freedom risks undermining that structure, allowing chaos to erode the foundations you cherish. In the end, the balance you seek may be better served by placing order first, then allowing freedom to flourish within its bounds.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I am Williamina Rohesiadotter, a disciplined infantry soldier of the human rank, guided by chaotic neutrality.  
I cherish independence, believing that blind obedience breeds tyranny, and I strive to inspire my comrades with the freedom to think and act.  
Yet the memory of a monstrous enemy still leaves me trembling, reminding me that even the strongest must confront fear.
